case_title: VICTORIA NASTOR VS. TA'DARREL E. POSEY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NASTOR, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT POSEY, TA'DARREL E. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CALIFORNIA ADVANCE PATROL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
